headline: Total Wireless Launch New Device Protection Plan Developed in Partnership With Assurant (AIZ)
summary: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE:AIZ) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 24, 2026, Total Wireless, a prepaid, no-contract wireless carrier operating on Verizon’s 5G network, launched a new protection plan, Total Wireless Protect+, that was developed in collaboration with Assurant, Inc. (NYSE:AIZ). The plan extends beyond covering just the cracked […]
